title: How a man of God handles the season when nothing's working
caption:
There's a season no one talks about.

Not the mountaintop. Not the rock bottom. The flat middle — where the obedience is real and the fruit isn't visible yet. The work is solid. The results aren't there.

Most men quit here. Or drift. Or start making deals with themselves.

But the dry season is where discipline actually forms. The wilderness was where God did some of His most serious work — with Moses, with David, with Paul, with Jesus himself before the ministry started.

Keep showing up. Feed what matters. Don't confuse the season for abandonment. And remember: you are not the season. Your identity is anchored to the One who called you — not to the outcome you're waiting on.

Save this for the brother who's about to quit in the gap.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #christianity #scripture
